heading: United States assistance for developing countries
label: 17331 United States assistance for developing countries
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the date that is 1 day after , see , set out as a note under , The Congress.Dec. 19, 2007section 1601 of Pub. L. 110–140section 1824 of Title 2

children.text: to produce the necessary market conditions for the private sector delivery of energy and environmental management services;

children.label: A
children.text: improving policy, legal, and regulatory frameworks;

children.label: B
children.text: increasing institutional abilities to provide energy and environmental management services; and

children.label: C
children.text: increasing public awareness and participation in the decision-making of delivering energy and environmental management services; and
to promote the use of American-made clean and efficient energy technologies, products, and energy and environmental management services.

children.heading: Report
children.label: b Report
children.text: The Administrator of the United States Agency for International Development shall submit to the appropriate congressional committees an annual report on the implementation of this section for each of the fiscal years 2008 through 2012.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: c Authorization of appropriations
children.text: To carry out this section, there are authorized to be appropriated to the Administrator of the United States Agency for International Development $200,000,000 for each of the fiscal years 2008 through 2012.
